svg.text: Three hypothesis queues. Each lane lists the candidates that most express that mechanism; bars separate mechanism relevance from observed paired-model support.
Caveat/action text is part of the graphic: panel-local, no-waters, and clash states are not hidden behind a composite score.
Official JTY027 hydrophobes; loop bridge still missing.
Panel-local tail wins; add bridge edges before ranking.
This map is for explanation and triage. Promotion still requires a shared pairwise reference/closed graph and hydrated evidence for solvent-ledge claims.
